definition: Ability to maintain essential functions through disturbance and change
measurement_note: Use service continuity recovery capacity redundancy and adaptive capacity indicators

definition: Ability to redesign structures rules infrastructures and pathways that produce vulnerability
measurement_note: Use transition pathways policy authority alternatives finance and anti-lock-in indicators

definition: Ability to reduce unequal vulnerability and distribute benefits and burdens fairly
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery aid housing affordability labor and access indicators

definition: Ability to restore ecological function biodiversity buffers watersheds soils and climate stability
measurement_note: Use restoration indicators habitat water carbon soil biodiversity and ecosystem-service evidence

definition: Quality of participation transparency public accountability community authority and trust
measurement_note: Use co-design decision records appeals public reporting and participation depth indicators

definition: Ability to protect workers households small businesses care systems and communities through change
measurement_note: Use income support job quality retraining pensions regional investment and social protection indicators

definition: Ability to reduce repeated exposure to hazards unsafe systems and chronic vulnerability
measurement_note: Use hazard exposure repeated loss health service and land-use indicators

definition: Degree to which costs risks labor displacement surveillance or ecological harm are shifted onto vulnerable groups
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because transformation becomes unjust or abandonment-like

definition: Degree to which the pathway creates or preserves future dependency and structural constraint
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because future options are narrowed

definition: Administrative financial technical political and participation burden required for implementation
measurement_note: Higher values require sequencing public capacity and finance review
